channel.title: Halil Arda Özongun
channel.description: Recent content on Halil Arda Özongun

item.description: About Me Link to heading Hello, I’m Halil Arda Özongun, a passionate Computer Science student at Bilkent University with a minor in Mathematics. My interests lie in deep learning, competitive programming, and software development. I am currently working under Erkut Erdem on improving image quality in low light using deep learning algorithms and have a strong foundation in algorithms and programming. Through this website, I aim to share my projects, thoughts, and experiences in the tech world.

Contact Me Link to heading I’d love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, collaboration ideas, or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out. Email: arda.ozongun@ug.bilkent.edu.tr Email: halilardaozongun@gmail.com LinkedIn: Halil Arda Özongun X: Halil Arda Özongun Location: Ankara, Turkey

Projects Link to heading Here are some of the projects I’ve worked on recently: Bilkent Connect Link to heading Technologies Used: Java, Android Studio, Firebase, Jsoup Developed a social media app for Bilkent University students with features for posts, sales, and meal ratings. UART Hardware Communication Protocol Link to heading Technologies Used: SystemVerilog, FPGA Implemented a UART module for asynchronous serial communication between FPGA boards. Offerings Scraper Link to heading Technologies Used: Python, Selenium, Docker, AWS
